title: ZXPong Guides
description: Official ZXPong guides covering gameplay, controls, Solo Play, World PVP, achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and everything you need to master the game.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: Discover ZXPong and learn what makes this retro-inspired arcade game part of the ZX Series.

pages.title: How to Play
pages.description: Learn the basics of ZXPong, from returning your first shot to building longer rallies.

pages.title: Controls
pages.description: Master paddle movement, improve your timing, and return every shot with confidence.

pages.title: Game Modes
pages.description: Choose between Solo Play and World PVP, and discover how each mode offers a different challenge.

pages.title: BarkinMad Coins
pages.description: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and unlock cosmetic paddle skins across the ZX Series.

pages.title: Achievements
pages.description: Unlock achievements by winning matches, completing rallies, and reaching new gameplay milestones.

pages.title: Leaderboards
pages.description: Compete for the longest rally and compare your performance with players around the world.

pages.title: Tips & Strategy
pages.description: Improve your reactions, positioning, and rally skills with practical gameplay advice.

pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.description: Find answers to the most common questions about ZXPong.

pages.title: Complete Guide
pages.description: Everything you need to know about ZXPong in one complete guide.
